text: I feel an intriguing sense of anticipation and curiosity as I stand at the threshold between an active, collaborative environment and a display of human research and innovation. The glass wall separates me physically, but intellectually I feel invited to reflect on the boundaries of knowledge, the interplay between humans and machines, and the creation of meaning in shared spaces. The vibrant colors and open design further energize my contemplative state, making me eager to engage with both the thinkers at work and the ideas displayed around me.
